title: Export from Outlook Contact/Account data
excerpt: I would like to have the option to choose which contacts/accounts need to be exported to CRM directly from outlook.com (or better in my mac App), without having an automations exporting all data or just some based on ver…

posts.author: fedevitta (Federico)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to have the option to choose which contacts/accounts need to be exported to CRM directly from outlook.com (or better in my mac App), without having an automations exporting all data or just some based on very basic filters.
